attributes.action: Reformation of DWP Child Maintenance Service. Redress Legality, Virtue & Justice
attributes.additional_details: Current Practice Violates Justice Causing Severe Financial & Psychological Harm to Family. Safeguards Fail to Prevent Ultra Vires Deductions by Breaching Statutory Protected Earnings Leaving Parents Without Sufficient Means of Provision. Enforcement Is Applied Without Independent Judicial Oversight. Calculations Disregard Ability to Pay & Exceed Lawful Authority Which Undermines Dignity & Stability. A Just Government Must Never Destroy Its Citizens Livelihoods to Claim Support. Reform Is Vital.
attributes.background: Mandate Judicial Care Before Enforcement; Legally Enforce Protected Earnings; Assess Eligibility Factors of Mothers & Fathers. End Coercive, Pejorative Threat-Based Dehumanising “Paying Parent” Language. Stop the Enforcement of Disputed Cases. Restore Proportionality, Legal Principle and Due Process

rejection.details:
We are not clear what action you are seeking from the UK Government or Parliament.

You can submit a new petition setting out more clearly what action you would like to see.
